Notes: Va. Intermont won the first meeting of the season 48-43 on Nov. 19 at VIC
Game.Officials: Dwight Ford,  Ronny Woods & Jerry Lawson

Descriptions.Efficiency:
Efficiency:

Descriptions.UsagePercentage:
Usage Percentage: The percentage of team plays used by a player. 
(FGA + (0.44 * FTA) + TO) / POSS
